title: Men's Prayer Retreat
excerpt: A three-day retreat for men to seek the face of God, build brotherhood, and return renewed and on fire.
description: Join us for our annual Men's Prayer Retreat — three purposeful days of worship, prayer, and fellowship in the heart of Thika. Sessions will be led by pastoral team members. Cost: Ksh 1,500 (covers accommodation and meals).

title: Game Night
excerpt: An evening of board games, laughter, and great food. Everyone is welcome — families, couples, and individuals!
description: TC Thika's community Game Night is all about fun and connection. Bring your favourite board game or card game, and we'll supply the snacks and good vibes. Free entry.

title: Ladies' Conference: Rooted
excerpt: A two-day gathering celebrating women grounded in the Word — worship, teaching, testimony, and sisterhood.
description: The TC Thika Ladies' Ministry presents 'Rooted' — a biennial conference for women at all stages of faith. This year's theme is Colossians 2:7: rooted and built up in him, strengthened in the faith. Registration: Ksh 800.
